title: Lesson 1167: 取り調べる, 取り立てる, 取り次ぐ...

items.gloss: to collect (debts); to dun; to exact; to extort; to appoint; to promote; to give patronage; to emphasize; to focus on; to call attention to
to act as an agent for; to intermediate; to announce (someone's arrival); to answer (the door, the phone); to receive (a guest at reception); to usher in (a guest); to convey (a message)
to remove; to deinstall; to take away; to set apart
to surround; to encircle; to enclose
